title: Shattering Sweet Korean Rice Songpyeon
description: A quick-fix Korean dish featuring fermented rice, coconut flakes, and stir-fry, shattering in your mouth with every bite, shojin-friendly and perfect for any meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Korean rice flour and salt.
Gradually add in the water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Flatten each ball into a small disk shape.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the crushed garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the chopped green onions and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the coconut flakes and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the dough disks to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and shattering.
Remove the songpyeon from the skillet and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
